title: RFE: Install shell completions in Homebrew
body:
Firstly, **thank you** for Skopeo!

Skopeo has a support for [shell completion](https://github.com/TomWright/dasel#completion) and has a [Homebrew formula for installation](https://github.com/containers/skopeo/blob/main/install.md#macos).

What do you think of adding another formula for installing the shell completion (such as [brew-cask-completion](https://github.com/Homebrew/homebrew-core/blob/HEAD/Formula/brew-cask-completion.rb), [rake-completion](https://github.com/Homebrew/homebrew-core/blob/HEAD/Formula/rake-completion.rb), [bundler-completion](https://github.com/Homebrew/homebrew-core/blob/HEAD/Formula/bundler-completion.rb), [ruby-completion](https://github.com/Homebrew/homebrew-core/blob/HEAD/Formula/ruby-completion.rb), [vagrant-completion](https://github.com/Homebrew/homebrew-core/blob/HEAD/Formula/vagrant-completion.rb), [packer-completion](https://github.com/Homebrew/homebrew-core/blob/HEAD/Formula/packer-completion.rb), [gem-completion](https://github.com/Homebrew/homebrew-core/blob/HEAD/Formula/gem-completion.rb), [pip-completion](https://github.com/Homebrew/homebrew-core/blob/HEAD/Formula/pip-completion.rb), ... just to name a few), or utilize the current formula for installing the shell completion?

comments.body: I'd expect the current formula to install the shell completion: we do this already for podman: https://github.com/Homebrew/homebrew-core/blob/983b8958109ea483ce593076e57694ca224cd308/Formula/podman.rb#L96
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
Skopeo's Homebrew formula already has shell completions installed by default! You may have to configure your shell to recognize homebrew completions: https://docs.brew.sh/Shell-Completion
